tasks.completion_summary: Added TranspileContext enum (Default, Eval) with Transpile overloads on BashTranspiler and PsEmitter; threaded context via ThreadStatic with try/finally; added internal PsBuiltinAliases HashSet and documented the Eval branch in EmitSimple standalone-mapping path. 6 new tests verify ls -la, sleep 1, diff a b, pwd emit Invoke-Bash* under Eval, and Default context matches the no-context overload. All 590 Core tests pass.

Replaced parse-time eval inlining with runtime Invoke-BashEval dispatch in PsEmitter.EmitEval. Each eval arg is emitted via the normal EmitWord path (so $(...)/backquote/$((...))/$VAR become pwsh subexpressions the host expands at runtime), and Invoke-BashEval receives the joined string to re-transpile under TranspileContext.Eval + Invoke-Expression in caller scope. Removed ~70-line ReconstructBashSource helper that previously rejected dynamic forms with ParseException. 17 eval-related BashTranspilerTests pass; fnm fixture test re-transpiles real `fnm env --shell bash` output under TranspileContext.Eval. All 593 Core + 235 Shell tests pass. Commit 6c369d1. Runtime cmdlet body (depth cap + caller-scope Invoke-Expression + fnm E2E) filed as follow-up xsIPF5TNb9jy since it touches psm1/module-packaging/shell files outside this task's listed scope.

Added public TranspileResult and LineMapping record structs in PsBash.Core.Transpiler, plus BashTranspiler.TranspileWithMap(source[, context]) overloads. Added BashParser.ParseTopLevelWithPositions returning each top-level statement paired with its first-token char offset, and PsEmitter.EmitWithContext for per-statement emission under a shared TranspileContext. TranspileWithMap joins statements with 
 (one pwsh line per top-level bash statement) and emits one LineMapping per statement using ParseException.ComputeLineCol for 1-based bash line/col. Comments and blank lines implicitly covered by the next statement's mapping, per spec. 9 new tests cover single command, multi-line source with comment+blank (acceptance example), semicolon statements sharing a bash line with distinct cols, empty/whitespace-only input, and wrapper equivalence modulo separator. All 602 Core tests pass.
Created PsBash.Cmdlets binary PowerShell module project targeting net8.0 with four cmdlet stubs. Build succeeds, module imports correctly, no alias hijacking. 602 Core tests pass.
Implemented Invoke-BashEval binary cmdlet with caller-scope execution, PassThru/NoLocalScope switches, and comprehensive xUnit test coverage. 602 Core + 235 Shell + 7 Cmdlet tests pass.

Validated ScriptBlock module-scope binding assumption. Assumption FAILS. Implemented fallback: nest PsBash.psd1 with FunctionsToExport=@('*') so functions resolve globally, AliasesToExport=@() prevents alias hijacking. 602 Core + 234 Shell + 11 Cmdlet tests pass.

Implemented Invoke-BashSource cmdlet with file-based source semantics and bash-mode fallback. Replaced emitter extension-swap behavior with passthrough to Invoke-BashSource. 603 Core + 234 Shell + 15 Cmdlet tests pass.
Implemented ConvertTo-PowerShell and Test-BashSyntax companion cmdlets. 603 Core + 234 Shell + 19 Cmdlet tests pass.
Implemented error rewriting in Invoke-BashEval with TranspileFailed/RuntimeFailed error IDs and bash line number mapping. 603 Core + 234 Shell + 22 Cmdlet tests pass.

Fixed LASTEXITCODE save/restore: set LASTEXITCODE = null before script invocation so TryConvertTo<int> detects unset vs caller-set values. Added SetE_EchoHi_CallerLastExitCodePreserved regression test. 31 Cmdlet + 603 Core tests pass.

Fixed spurious ERR trap: changed wrapped script's finally from LASTEXITCODE -ne 0 to LASTEXITCODE (truthy check) so null/unset is treated as falsy. Added TrapErr_DoesNotFireOnStaleLastExitCode and TrapErrAndExit_SetE_False_BothFire tests. 31 Cmdlet + 603 Core tests pass.

Implemented transparent worker respawn: added HasExited to PwshWorker, EnsureWorkerAsync in InteractiveShell, and IOException catch at top of interactive loop. Added HasExited_AfterKill_ReturnsTrue test. 604 Core + 233 Shell tests pass.

Investigated and confirmed expected behavior: transpiler emits powershell.exe --help correctly. The parse error is caused by Windows PowerShell 5.1 interpreting bare arguments as commands to execute. Reproduces identically in cmd.exe. pwsh.exe (PowerShell 7+) handles --help correctly.
Task already completed in Dart (status=Done). No local changes needed. LASTEXITCODE, set -e, trap EXIT/ERR wiring was implemented in prior commits (c8e2d31, 5eb8403, 8ba0900).
